index.html에 FR/IT 언어 버튼 추가

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Telegram "no response generated" — synthesis, person fields, calendar range (#44)

Three root causes for empty/wrong Telegram responses:

1. When the LLM exhausted all 5 tool rounds, the synthesis round ran
   without tools AND without any instruction to produce text. The LLM
   saw a conversation ending in tool results and produced nothing.
   Fix: add explicit synthesis instruction + fallback from tool results.

2. person_info omitted birthday, company, and position fields — data
   from Apple Contacts was fetched but never shown to the LLM.

3. Calendar search hardcoded ±30 days, missing recurring events like
   birthdays months away. Widened default to ±180 days.

Also: gitignore live e2e test file (contains real names for integration
tests against live server).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: LifeOS
repository.description: Personal assistant, data aggregation, and CRM integrating Obsidian, Gsuite, and messaging

commit.message:
Add offline result delivery — buffer streamed content and replay on reconnect

When a user disconnects mid-task, the AI response was silently lost.
Now the server accumulates stream_delta content per task and, if the
user is offline when the task completes, stores the full result in a
pending queue (24h TTL). On WebSocket reconnect the pending results
are replayed via a new task:result message type.

commit.message:
fix: coerce Settings.value() to Number for instant post-shot review check

Settings.value() returns a QVariant that becomes a string on Windows
(REG_SZ), so "0" === 0 was false and the instant-close path was never
taken, leaving the review page visible indefinitely.

commit.message:
feat: add live Logs tab to active session view (D1)

Stream all backend Python logs to the browser in real-time via the existing
WebSocket connection as a new `log` event type. Each session attaches a
WebSocketLogHandler to the root logger on start and removes it on teardown.

Backend:
- Add WsLog model (type, level, message, ts) to models.py
- Add WebSocketLogHandler class to ws_handler.py; attached/detached per session

Frontend:
- Add LogLevel, LogEntry types and logs[] to AppState (types.ts)
- Add `log` WS event handler and CLEAR_LOGS UI action to reducer.ts
- Register CLEAR_LOGS in AppContext UI_ACTION_TYPES set
- New LogsTab component: monospace display, color-coded levels
  (ERROR/CRITICAL=red, WARNING=yellow, DEBUG=muted, INFO=normal),
  auto-scroll toggle, Clear button, capped at 500 entries
- Add Logs tab with Terminal icon and entry count badge to ActiveSessionPage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ci: add GitHub Actions workflows for CI and Docker publish (#8, #9)

CI workflow (ci.yml):
- Runs on push/PR to main
- Jobs: lint (ESLint + Prettier), type-check (tsc --noEmit),
  test (vitest), build (next build), docker-build (validates Dockerfile)
- Uses pnpm cache via actions/setup-node

Publish workflow (publish.yml):
- Runs on push to main (latest tag) and GitHub Release (semver tags)
- Builds multi-platform image (linux/amd64, linux/arm64)
- Pushes to ghcr.io/mrnustik/plexfixer using GITHUB_TOKEN
- Uses docker/metadata-action for automatic tag generation
- GHA layer cache for faster builds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add unicorn pitch assets: hallucination case study, arbitrage case study, agentic gateway vision, and updated pitch deck

- Case Study: Hallucination Detection — Gaia caught fabricated SYSC 10.3.5R with 100% confidence while 3 competitors produced full fabrications. Includes raw test data and agent-by-agent breakdown.
- Case Study: Regulatory Arbitrage — FinTech compressed 3 months of multi-jurisdiction research (UK/EU/UAE crypto lending) into 4.8 seconds, saving £50K+ in legal fees. FCA Sandbox application accepted.
- Vision: Agentic Gateway — "The Visa/Mastercard of AI Trust" vision for AI-to-AI compliance handshakes. Per-transaction pricing (£0.01-£0.10), £120M+ ARR potential at scale. Includes blocked "guaranteed 8% returns" proof of concept.
- Updated pitch deck: references all 3 case studies in traction slide, adds Gateway per-transaction revenue model, adds appendix linking all supporting documents.

feat: 添加方案A/B/C对比表格

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

セキュリティ・型安全性・認可・a11y全面修正

Security (Critical):
- dev用ヘッダー認証をproductionで無効化
- JWTフォールバック秘密鍵を削除、Workers env注入に対応
- FEからx-user-id/x-user-roleヘッダー送信を廃止
- CORSを環境変数ベースのオリジン制限に変更

Security (High):
- 全ルートでMass Assignment対策（ホワイトリスト方式）
- ロール値のランタイムバリデーション追加
- ファイル削除にadminOnly認可追加
- タイミング攻撃緩和（ダミーbcrypt比較）
- パスワードリセットトークン使用後に即削除

Authorization:
- スケジュールイベントにオーナーシップチェック追加
- ドキュメント管理にeditorOrAdmin/adminOnlyミドルウェア適用
- チームイベント閲覧にメンバーシップ検証追加

Type Safety:
- _db: any を AppDatabase | null に修正
- 全ルートのc.req.json()に型パラメータ追加

Frontend:
- LinksPage二重JSON.stringify修正
- useAuthをReact Context化（AuthProvider）
- DocumentsPageにロールベース表示制御
- 全フォームにhtmlFor/id関連付け
- nav aria-label/aria-current追加
- モーダルa11y（role=dialog, Escape, focus）
- カレンダーイベントのキーボード操作対応
- prefers-reduced-motion対応
- App.css未使用スタイル削除

Tests: BE 82 + FE 37 = 119 全Green

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add within-scene and z-score normalized LOSO analysis

- Per-scene correlations: all 16 scenes show negative ρ (mean |ρ|=0.60)
- Within-scene XGBoost: 16/16 scenes R²>0, mean R²=0.70, mean ρ=0.84
- LOSO on z-scored PSNR: 11/14 scenes R²>0, mean R²=0.23, mean ρ=0.65
- Leave-one-(scene,k)-out: 47/54 slices R²>0, T&T mean R²=0.57

Z-score normalization removes per-scene PSNR baseline, enabling meaningful
cross-scene generalization that raw PSNR LOSO cannot achieve.

Fix ErrorBoundary crash on homepage from InterestingSuggestions

- Replace direct useQuery calls (with conditional skip) with established
  useCars/useFeaturedCars hooks — avoids Apollo v4 skip-option issues
- Add null safety for car.fuelType and car.transmission before calling
  vehicleTranslator methods (prevents TypeError if DB value is null)
- Wrap InterestingSuggestions with its own ErrorBoundary (null fallback)
  in Index.tsx so any future crash is isolated, not full-page

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(docker): add SupplementaryGroups=docker drop-in for gateway service

Systemd user services don't inherit group changes made after the session
started. Adding SupplementaryGroups=docker to a service drop-in ensures
the gateway process always has docker socket access when sandbox is enabled,
without requiring logout/login.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v1.6.7: Fix SessionManager.ts - complete JARVIS-compatible rewrite

SessionManager was still using old code that imported non-existent
modules (config, gitClone, claudeRunner) and had incompatible API.
Completely rewritten to be self-contained with all functionality
inline: git clone, Claude Code CLI spawn, stream-json parsing,
and JARVIS webhook integration via axios.

commit.message:
fix: seat hold & fully converted status not reverting on uncheck

Bug: unchecking 'Seat Hold Received' checkbox in edit form did not
revert the lead status — the status dropdown was still sending
'Seat Hold Confirmed' and the old if-only block never cleared it.

Fix:
- Checkboxes now override dropdown (elif chain, not two separate ifs)
- Both unchecked + status in ('Seat Hold Confirmed','Fully Converted')
  → status reverts to 'Track Selected' (if track chosen) or 'New'
- seat_hold_amount reset to 0 and pending recalculated when unchecked

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix missing booking confirmation modal

The onCheckoutComplete validation was too strict — it required
orderconfirmation/orderid fields which resource booking results
don't always include. Now accepts any truthy result as a
successful booking, only treating null/undefined as a cart clear.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add API key format validation and use secret resolution in template

- Warn (non-fatal) if API key prefix doesn't match the chosen provider
  e.g. sk-ant- for Anthropic, sk- for OpenAI
- Template: api_key now uses <+secrets.getValue(<+input>)> so the user
  provides just the secret identifier (e.g. org.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) and
  Harness resolves it as a proper secret — avoids raw string passing issues

Extend test suite with 7 new sections (J-P) — 60 additional tests

Add nanobot-specific tests:
- J: Cron advanced scheduling (at/cron/every, system_event, delete_after_run)
- K: Memory advanced (USER.md CRUD, history, stats, search, write-protection)
- L: Skills advanced (partial update, toggle always, name sanitization, duplicates)

Add runtime E2E integration tests:
- M: Skill runtime (always-on injection, on-demand read_skill tool)
- N: Cron runtime (trigger agent_turn/system_event, verify state updates)
- O: Long-term memory E2E (MEMORY/SOUL/HISTORY round-trip, consolidation)
- P: Multi-turn reasoning (reasoning_effort entity, conversation continuity)

Fix P2 test to check entity attributes instead of settings API.
Add curl timeout handling for AI conversation calls under strict mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Drastically speed up calibration and fix looping

- Reduce grid from 4x4 (16 points) to 3x3 (9 points)
- Disable retry mechanism entirely (RETRY_QUALITY_THRESHOLD=0)
- Skip GazePreview — go directly to analysis after calibration
- Remove per-point countdown delay (settle frames handle eye stabilization)
- Reduce point timeout from 5s to 3.5s
- Relax all sample filters (IRIS_STD_MAX, MIN_CONFIDENCE, IRIS_BUFFER_SIZE)
- Reduce MIN_SAMPLES_PER_POINT from 25 to 20
- Total calibration time: ~15-20 seconds (was 60-90+)

commit.message:
Scoring engine: 6 fixes for R:R, RSI regime, observability & thread safety

1. Dynamic R:R — ATR multiplier now varies per stock based on RS_63d,
   VCP score, and momentum consistency (was fixed 1.67x for all stocks).
   VCP setups get tighter stops using support levels.
2. Regime-aware RSI penalties — overbought penalty scales with market
   regime (distribution: -5/-7 vs bullish: -2/-3).
3. R:R Score floor — stocks with R:R Score < 50 capped at 75 max,
   preventing weak R:R from ranking #1.
4. Exception logging — replaced 11 silent `except: pass` blocks with
   `logger.debug()` for observability.
5. Magic numbers → config — moved 16 hardcoded values from
   scoring_engine.py to BONUS_CONFIG and RSI_ADJUSTMENTS in
   scoring_config.py.
6. ML thread safety — added threading.Lock around ML_MISSING_FEATURES
   mutation in ml_20d_inference.py.
